title: Wolf textures from version 1.20.5
description: Texture pack that adds the new wolves from the official Minecraft version 1.20.5 (24w10a)
body:
# WARNING! YOU MUST USE OPTIFINE FOR THIS TO WORK!

### Features:
In survival mode, you can breed wolves, and no matter what species the parents are, you will always have a chance to get a cub of a different species. Additionally, you can also search for them in different parts of the game world.

### Important Note:
With update 1.20.5 (24w10a), different types of wolves are now tied to specific biomes. However, this texture pack will not reflect this change, so all types of wolves will appear everywhere.

**Please let me know if you encounter any errors or other issues.**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Don't worry if the texture pack displays the wrong version, it will still work. :)

</details>
